name: original_music_track
description: Suede Labs original music track producer for agents, creators, brands, game studios, app developers, podcasters, ad teams, and crypto communities that need a rights-aware, fingerprinted music track from a text prompt. Generates original AI music suitable for background scoring, social posts, ads, promos, app soundtracks, character themes, token launches, lo-fi loops, cinematic cues, vocal demos, and paid x402/ACP agent commerce workflows. Each track is registered to the Suede IP Registry on Base for downstream provenance and attestation.

prompt.description: Detailed text description of the music to generate. Include genre, mood, instrumentation, tempo, energy, intended use, and any reference artists or eras.
examples: A 30-second ambient lofi beat with vinyl crackle, mellow electric piano, soft kick, late-night studio mood
An upbeat synthwave instrumental in the style of a retro arcade level, driving bassline, neon energy, 120 BPM
A cinematic orchestral cue with rising strings and warm brass for a product launch reveal

duration_seconds.description: Length of the generated track in seconds. Use shorter durations for stings and idents, longer for background scoring.

instrumental_only.description: Whether the track should be instrumental only (no vocals). Defaults to true for broader licensing flexibility.

examples.prompt: A 30-second cinematic synthwave background track for an AI music app launch, neon energy, driving bass, modern production
